prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 4SN-LSPEEDSTICK-WLF-HPN-4PK Product Type: BODY_DEODORANT Brand (from catalog): Lady Speed Stick Existing Title: Lady Speed Stick Invisible Dry Antiperspirant & Deodorant, Wild Freesia - 1.4 oz - 4 pk Description: Daylong Fragrance and Freshness

With fresh, natural scents the Lady Speed Stick Invisible Dry Antiperspirant & Deodorant, Wild Freesia provides you 24-hour protection. With splendid quality, it offers you great fragrance that lasts daylong while boosting your confidence further. The 'scent renewal formula' in it makes the deodorant more special. This unique formula keeps odor and sweat away for a longer period. Most importantly, it leaves no white residues and stays clear.

Long-lasting fragrance for 24-hour protection
Dries quickly
Helps reducing underarms perspiration
Unique scent renewal formula

No wetness, no odor. It provides you a fresh feel daylong.

Just For You: All skin types

A Closer Look: Lady Speed Stick Invisible Dry Antiperspirant & Deodorant, Wild Freesia deodorant for women helps reduce underarm perspiration. Wild freesia provides a scent that keeps you fresh throughout the day.

Get Started: Turn the dial and apply through underarms. Replace the cap after use Search Terms: (none) Features: (none) === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Lady Speed Stick Wild Freesia Invisible Dry Deodorant 4-pk

anthropic.title_differentiation: 24-Hour Protection, Invisible Dry Formula, No White Residue, Scent Renewal Technology, Quick Drying
